subcategory: Deprecated Login-With-Token Endpoint Active on API v2.7

steps.vulnerability_name: Retire v2.7 login-with-token — return HTTP 410 Gone immediately
steps.description: The /v2.7/user/login-with-token endpoint was never removed and crashes with HTTP 500 when called. Replace the entire method body with an immediate HTTP 410 Gone response that never delegates to the service layer.
New HandlerInterceptor that blocks retired paths before they reach any controller. Future endpoint retirements are added to RETIRED_PATHS rather than modifying individual controllers.
New WebMvcConfigurer that registers the DeprecatedVersionInterceptor so it runs before all controllers.

verification.description: v2.7 endpoint must return HTTP 410 Gone and never reach the service
v4.0 endpoint must still return HTTP 403 (behaviour unchanged)
